Interface GameEventListener

public interface GameEventListener
Observer interface that the View/Controller implements to react to game events.

The Model fires these callbacks on the JavaFX Application Thread when significant game-state changes occur. The View layer (FXML controller) is expected to update the GUI accordingly.

All methods have empty default implementations so that the View only needs to override the events it cares about.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    default void
    onCardDrawn(Player player, Card card)
    Fired after a player has drawn a replacement card from the deck.
    default void
    onCardPlayed(Player player, Card card, int newSum)
    Fired after a player has successfully played a card onto the table.
    default void
    onDeckRefreshed(int newDeckSize)
    Fired when the deck runs out of cards and is refilled by reshuffling the table pile (excluding the top card).
    default void
    onGameOver(Player winner)
    Fired when only one player remains and the game is over.
    default void
    onGameStarted(int tableSum)
    Fired once after the game has been fully set up: all players have received their 4 starting cards and the initial table card has been placed.
    default void
    onInvalidPlay(Player player, Card card, int currentSum)
    Fired when an attempt to play an invalid card is detected (mainly relevant for the human player's GUI interaction).
    default void
    onPlayerEliminated(Player player)
    Fired when a player is eliminated because none of their cards can be played without exceeding a table sum of 50.
    default void
    onTurnStarted(Player player)
    Fired at the beginning of a player's turn so the View can highlight the active player and enable / disable controls.

  • Method Details

    • onGameStarted

      default void onGameStarted(int tableSum)
      Fired once after the game has been fully set up: all players have received their 4 starting cards and the initial table card has been placed.
      Parameters:
      tableSum - the initial sum on the table (0, 1, or -10 depending on the first card drawn)

    • onTurnStarted

      default void onTurnStarted(Player player)
      Fired at the beginning of a player's turn so the View can highlight the active player and enable / disable controls.
      Parameters:
      player - the player whose turn is starting

    • onCardPlayed

      default void onCardPlayed(Player player, Card card, int newSum)
      Fired after a player has successfully played a card onto the table.
      Parameters:
      player - the player who played the card
      card - the card that was played
      newSum - the updated table sum after the card was played

    • onCardDrawn

      default void onCardDrawn(Player player, Card card)
      Fired after a player has drawn a replacement card from the deck.
      Parameters:
      player - the player who drew the card
      card - the card drawn (visible only for the human player; for machines the View should display it face-down)

    • onDeckRefreshed

      default void onDeckRefreshed(int newDeckSize)
      Fired when the deck runs out of cards and is refilled by reshuffling the table pile (excluding the top card).
      Parameters:
      newDeckSize - the number of cards now available in the refreshed deck

    • onPlayerEliminated

      default void onPlayerEliminated(Player player)
      Fired when a player is eliminated because none of their cards can be played without exceeding a table sum of 50.
      Parameters:
      player - the eliminated player

    • onGameOver

      default void onGameOver(Player winner)
      Fired when only one player remains and the game is over.
      Parameters:
      winner - the surviving (winning) player

    • onInvalidPlay

      default void onInvalidPlay(Player player, Card card, int currentSum)
      Fired when an attempt to play an invalid card is detected (mainly relevant for the human player's GUI interaction).
      Parameters:
      player - the player who attempted the invalid play
      card - the card that was rejected
      currentSum - the sum on the table at the time of the attempt
